target.product_type: Football scouting and career simulation game
target.primary_user_goal: Discover, evaluate, recommend, and track players while building a scouting career
target.primary_business_goal: Deliver a distinctive and trustworthy Early Access simulation with release-grade depth and replay value
target.audience: Football management-simulation players, scouting enthusiasts, and long-form systems players
assumptions: Controlled late-game and consequence states were seeded through the repository's existing E2E injection contract
Manual NVDA, VoiceOver, physical hardware, packaged-platform, and moderated-usability evidence remain outside this rendered audit

flows_walked: observation situation setup to live pitch
country browser to regional dossier and trip posture
Inbox decision with deadline and default
career moment overlay to presentation settings
automated_checks: Axe scans on core and targeted states
final 3-of-3 focused country-dossier and Settings recheck

visual_hierarchy.rationale: Critical states foreground one question, visible stakes, and one next action

layout_spacing.rationale: Desktop and 390px surfaces are bounded; long expert documents remain the ceiling

typography.rationale: Display and body hierarchy is consistent, while dense regional and evidence metadata remains compact

color_contrast.rationale: Semantic color roles are disciplined and final targeted scans contain no contrast violation

components_states.rationale: Simulation-specific states share a clear card, dialog, badge, meter, and action grammar

interaction_feedback.rationale: Observation, travel, decisions, and callbacks visibly return causal feedback

information_architecture_navigation.rationale: Six stable workspaces connect directly to relevant entities and decisions

conversion_task_flow.rationale: Find, Verify, Recommend, and Track is explicit and continuous across the product

accessibility_inclusive_ux.rationale: Automated semantics, focus, overflow, motion, and audio alternatives are strong; manual screen-reader evidence is open
evidence: zero serious or critical targeted Axe violations

imagery_iconography.rationale: Photography, pitch, map, newspaper, and icons materially reinforce the scouting fantasy

brand_visual_system.rationale: Scouting-room green, professional evidence surfaces, and editorial callbacks form a distinct identity

emotional_trust_polish.rationale: Career moments and permanent records turn simulation facts into trustworthy emotional callbacks

conflicts: Long report and dossier documents need stronger expert section navigation
Dense regional and evidence metadata uses more microtype than calmer career surfaces
Ordinary weekly messages have less authored visual variation than major career moments
strengths: One causal Find Verify Recommend Track loop
Simulation uncertainty and consequence have visible forms
Emotional presentation remains text-authoritative and archive-linked

overall.core_diagnosis: The design grammar and gameplay intent now agree; remaining friction comes from fitting professional-simulation density into mobile and popover formats without weakening the evidence model

findings.summary: Reports and dossiers create long mobile traversal
findings.why_it_matters: Expert players repeatedly revisit specific sections and should not pay the full scroll cost every time

findings.summary: Dense regional and evidence surfaces rely on compact metadata
findings.why_it_matters: Future depth can quietly become inaccessible if causes and tradeoffs migrate into microtype
Automation cannot validate announcements, reading order, cognitive flow, or real keyboard-only play

findings.summary: Major career moments are more visually varied than ordinary callbacks
findings.why_it_matters: More authored variation inside the existing callback system will increase memory and replay value without adding breadth

recommendations.title: Add expert section navigation to reports and dossiers
recommendations.problem: Long professional artifacts require repeated vertical traversal
recommendations.recommended_change: Add a responsive section index with completion, error counts, and jump-to-first-required-field behavior
acceptance_criteria: Section jumps work on desktop and mobile
Required-field and error counts are visible
No simulation state is duplicated in navigation UI

recommendations.title: Ratchet decision-critical typography and contrast tokens
recommendations.problem: Dense new systems can express important meaning through increasingly small metadata
recommendations.expert_principle: WCAG readability and recognition over recall
recommendations.recommended_change: Set minimum body/helper sizes and contrast roles for causes, tradeoffs, and actions, backed by automated visual checks
acceptance_criteria: Decision-critical helper copy is at least 12px
Metadata is at least 10-11px
Text contrast meets 4.5 to 1

recommendations.title: Complete manual assistive-technology certification
recommendations.problem: Automated checks do not prove real screen-reader gameplay
recommendations.recommended_change: Run documented NVDA and VoiceOver journeys through onboarding, observation, reporting, decisions, and Career
acceptance_criteria: Core journey completes without pointer input
Dynamic state changes are announced understandably
All discovered blockers are closed or explicitly release-blocking

recommendations.title: Expand career-moment presentation families
recommendations.problem: The new emotional system is strong but has room for more authored variation
recommendations.recommended_change: Create category-specific visual and audio treatments for failure, betrayal, comeback, promotion, and farewell while preserving text parity
acceptance_criteria: At least five distinct category treatments
Reduced-motion and audio-off parity
No repeated cue within a short callback window

recommendations.title: Moderate the first hour
recommendations.problem: The designed hook has not been validated with representative players
recommendations.expert_principle: Match between system and users' mental model
recommendations.recommended_change: Test first discovery, evidence interpretation, reporting, and callback comprehension with new and returning simulation players
acceptance_criteria: Tasks and thresholds are defined before sessions
Players can explain Find Verify Recommend Track
SUS and task-completion release thresholds are met

redesign_thesis: Future polish should feel like a scout's fast personal working system: preserve every causal detail, but reveal it through clear summaries, section jumps, contextual drill-ins, and emotionally distinct callbacks
acceptance_criteria: All core and targeted states retain zero serious or critical Axe violations on desktop and mobile
No document-level horizontal overflow at 390px
One active country drill-in surface at a time with focus restoration
Report and dossier section navigation exposes completion and errors
Decision-critical causes and tradeoffs never rely on sub-12px type or color alone
Career moments preserve factual text, reduced-motion parity, optional audio, and an archive route
Manual NVDA and VoiceOver journeys complete without pointer input
Moderated players can explain the core scouting loop and evidence uncertainty
